zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Segrave於1338年10月25日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾布拉比時，她的父親John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave23歲，母親Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk18歲。她於1359年3月25日與Sir John de Mowbray III在英國林可爾史爾艾普沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年3月14日在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾可朗斯頓 可利亞爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Segrave于1338年10月25日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾布拉比时，她的父亲John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave23岁，母亲Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk18岁。她于1359年3月25日与Sir John de Mowbray III在英国林可爾史爾艾普沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年3月14日在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年30岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾可朗斯頓 可利亞爾。

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Segrave was born on 25 October 1338, in Blaby, Leicestershire, England, her father, John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave, was 23 and her mother, Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, was 18. She married Sir John de Mowbray III on 25 March 1359, in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 March 1369, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Segrave est née le 25 octobre 1338, à Blaby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Mowbray III le 25 mars 1359, à Epworth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mars 1369, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Segrave am 25. Oktober 1338 in Blaby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk 18. Sie hat am 25. März 1359 in Epworth, Lincolnshire, England Sir John de Mowbray III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. März 1369 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Leicestershire, England und wurde in Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Segrave è nata il il 25 ottobre 1338 nel Blaby, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Mowbray III il 25 marzo 1359, nel Epworth, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 marzo 1369, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Segraveが1338年10月25日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブラビーで生まれた時，父John de Segrave 4th Baron Segraveは23歳，母Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolkは18歳であった。1359年3月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエプウオルスでSir John de Mowbray IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年3月14日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで30歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアクロクストン ケリアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Segrave(이)가 1338년 10월 25일 영국 레이스스터실르 블라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1359년 3월 25일 영국 링코실르 p워스에서 Sir John de Mowbray III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 3월 14일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 크록스턴 케리앨에 묻혔다.

mn.25 October 1338–14 March 1369: 1338 оны Аравдугаар сарын 25–1369 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 14

pt.25 October 1338–14 March 1369: 25 de outubro de 1338–14 de março de 1369
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Segrave nasceu em 25 de outubro de 1338, em Blaby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Mowbray III em 25 de março de 1359, em Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de março de 1369, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Segrave родилась 25 октября 1338 г. в местности блаби, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Mowbray III 25 марта 1359 г. в местности эпворт, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 марта 1369 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности крокстон кирряль, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.25 October 1338–14 March 1369: 25 de octubre de 1338–14 de marzo de 1369
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Segrave nació el 25 de octubre de 1338, en Blaby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Segrave 4th Baron Segrave, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret of England Duchess of Norfolk, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir John de Mowbray III el 25 de marzo de 1359, en Epworth, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de marzo de 1369, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
